page.title.description: Page heading for the free-claim flow at /claim/[domain].

page.domainClaimedSuccess.description: Success toast shown after a domain is claimed for free.

page.claimFailed.description: Error toast shown when a free claim fails. {message} is the raw backend error text — keep as-is.

page.invalidDomain.title.description: Title of the error card shown when the URL domain is not a valid normalized Namefi domain.

page.invalidDomain.description.description: Body of the invalid-domain error card explaining the domain isn't a valid normalized Namefi domain.

page.invalidDomain.hint.description: Hint under the invalid-domain card. Keep the literal example domain "alice.0x.city" untranslated.

page.invalidDomain.goBack.description: Button on the invalid-domain card that navigates back to the previous page.

page.ineligibleBanner.title.description: Title of the warning banner shown when the domain isn't eligible for a free claim.

page.ineligibleBanner.description.description: Body of the ineligible warning banner offering to buy instead or go back to search.

page.ineligibleBanner.addToCart.description: Button on the ineligible banner that adds the domain to the cart for purchase.

page.ineligibleBanner.goBack.description: Button on the ineligible banner that navigates back to the previous page.

page.summary.duration.description: Domain summary line showing claim term and that it's free. ICU plural on {count} (number of years); '• Free' marks the zero cost.

page.submit.description: Primary button that submits the free claim.

widget.defaultTitle.description: Default heading of the DomainClaim widget (promo claim entry); '0x' is a literal product term — keep verbatim.

widget.defaultSubtitle.description: Default subtitle of the DomainClaim widget. 'Web3' is a technical term — keep verbatim.

widget.qualifyPrompt.description: Instruction above the qualification steps in the DomainClaim widget.

widget.steps.signIn.trigger.description: Accordion header for the sign-in qualification step in the claim widget.

widget.steps.signIn.signedIn.description: Message inside the sign-in step when the user is already signed in.

widget.steps.signIn.signedOut.description: Message inside the sign-in step prompting a signed-out user to sign in or create an account.

widget.steps.linkSocial.trigger.description: Accordion header for the link-social-media qualification step in the claim widget.

widget.steps.linkSocial.description.description: Explanation in the link-social step that usernames starting with "0x" qualify for the promo. Keep the literal "0x" untranslated.

widget.steps.linkSocial.visitProfile.description: Button in the link-social step that navigates to the user's profile page.

widget.steps.enterDomain.trigger.description: Accordion header for the enter-domain qualification step in the claim widget.

widget.steps.enterDomain.description.description: Instruction in the enter-domain step telling the user to enter a qualifying domain name to claim free.

widget.qualifying.checking.description: Status text while checking the user's linked social accounts for qualifying domains.

widget.qualifying.error.description: Status text when checking for qualifying domains based on linked social accounts errored out.

widget.qualifying.none.description: Status text when the user's linked social accounts don't qualify them for any free domain.

widget.qualifying.list.description: Lists the user's qualifying domain names. {domains} is a pre-joined, quoted list of domain names — keep the domain names untranslated.

widget.input.placeholderMobile.description: Placeholder for the subdomain input on mobile (short form).

widget.input.placeholderDesktop.description: Placeholder for the subdomain input on desktop.

widget.button.loginToClaim.description: Claim-button label shown when the user is not signed in.

widget.button.checking.description: Claim-button label while checking promo eligibility / domain availability.

widget.button.inCart.description: Claim-button label when the domain is already in the cart.

widget.button.claiming.description: Claim-button label while the claim is being processed.

widget.button.claimNow.description: Default claim-button label inviting the user to claim now.
